title: Build the verification and evidence harness

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing evidence modules
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/verification-manifest.test.ts tests/unit/traceability.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The manifest validator and traceability modules did not exist

commands.name: Focused unit verification
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/verification-manifest.test.ts tests/unit/traceability.test.ts

commands.name: Local verification launched a development server after production build
commands.expectedFailure: Unit, property, and integration gates passed before the development BDD server recompiled during form interaction, causing Failed to find Server Action and 20 failed browser stories

commands.name: Canonical verifier lacked an operating-system-neutral production override
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/bdd-server-mode.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Two focused contracts failed because the CLI ignored --production and the verify script did not request production BDD mode

commands.name: Production BDD mode is explicit in canonical verification
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/bdd-server-mode.test.ts

commands.name: Deterministic repository verification with the already-built browser server

visualEvidence.rationale: FND-02 changes repository verification infrastructure, not a screen or browser journey.

proofs.description: Manifest and screenshot metadata unit tests
Requirement ownership and orphan unit tests
Generated manifest validity and contradiction properties
Schema, artifact collector, sanitization, and broken-link integration tests
Canonical full verification pins BDD to the already-built production server while focused BDD keeps its explicit development default

knownLimitations: This harness validates implementation proof, not Pactwire product effectiveness.
Raw CI artifacts are retained for 14 days; durable sanitized proof is committed under docs/evidence.
